title: poa alta
intro: Poa alta, also known as Mountain Grass or Bluebunch Wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Poa alta include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant protection. Poa alta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
